title: Purely Crispy Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A herbal and crispy Brazilian dish featuring chimichurri sauce, perfect for a sick day, with high protein content to help you recover. This recipe uses an ice bath to shock the chicken, resulting in a tender and juicy texture.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, parsley, oregano, garlic, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto the soaked wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
While the skewers are grilling, prepare an ice bath by filling a large bowl with ice and water.
Once the skewers are cooked, immediately submerge them in the ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Let the skewers chill in the ice bath for 5 minutes before removing them and serving with chimichurri sauce.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley and oregano if desired.
